retrieval_plan.question: 统计2025年第三季度资产负债率在30%-50%之间的公司数量；计算这些公司的平均净资产收益率；对比该均值与资产负债率高于50%公司的均值差异；结合研报说明资产负债率与净资产收益率的关系

sql:
WITH target_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_code,
        stock_abbr,
        asset_liability_ratio,
        roe
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
        AND asset_liability_ratio BETWEEN 30 AND 50
),
high_leverage_companies AS (
    SELECT 
        stock_code,
        stock_abbr,
        asset_liability_ratio,
        roe
    FROM financials_view
    WHERE report_period = '2025Q3'
        AND asset_liability_ratio > 50
)
SELECT 
    '资产负债率30%-50%' AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS company_count,
    AVG(roe) AS avg_roe
FROM target_companies
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    '资产负债率>50%' AS category,
    COUNT(*) AS company_count,
    AVG(roe) AS avg_roe
FROM high_leverage_companies
UNION ALL
SELECT 
    '差异对比' AS category,
    NULL AS company_count,
    (SELECT AVG(roe) FROM target_companies) - (SELECT AVG(roe) FROM high_leverage_companies) AS avg_roe_difference
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM target_companies) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM high_leverage_companies);
